{{Quote|Some said that Revan was born in the Outer Regions, beyond the Rim, and that's what called to him during the Mandalorian Wars… and after. It was the call of home.|[[Kreia]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Deralia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. After the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Capture of Darth Revan|captured]] the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], the [[Dantooine Jedi Enclave Council|Jedi Council of]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to heal the severe damage to Revan's mind, which he sustained after being betrayed by his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Darth Malak]]. But instead of restoring him, the Council opted to reprogram Revan by inserting an artificial personality into his vulnerable mind. As a result, Revan's memories of his life were buried under his subconsciousness and suppressed by false memories, thus leading him to believe that he was a [[Soldier/Legends|common recruit]] in the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military]] who was from the planet Deralia.<ref name="kotor">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

While still unaware of his true self, Revan was quickly [[Jedi training/Legends|retrained]] as a Jedi by the same Council that reprogrammed him on Dantooine. Shortly after ascending to the rank of [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] in record time, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Bastila Shan]] asked Revan a series of questions to test the extent of Revan's reconditioned state of mind. Among her questions, she inquired as to what planet he hailed from. Revan stated that he was born on Deralia in a [[Deralia system/Legends|remote system]]. Though Revan did not understand the true nature of Bastila's personal questions, he effectively demonstrated that the Council's actions worked perfectly; the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] was utterly deceived by artificial memories of a life he never actually lived.<ref name="kotor" />

[[File:Fortitude.png|thumb|left|Fortitude above Deralia]]
300 years later, the spaceship [[Fortitude (Valor-class)|''Fortitude'']] almost crashed into Deralia with [[The Barsen'thor|Barsen'thor]] and several others on board. This catastrophe was narrowly averted by the clever machinations of [[Nadia Grell]], who managed to get the crew to work together to steer the plummeting ship into orbit instead.

==Behind the scenes==
Planet Deralia was first introduced as the homeworld of reprogrammed Revan in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', a [[2003]] [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] by [[BioWare]]. The locational information and coordinates for Deralia system were introduced in [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion]], an online supplement to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. This article assumes that the planet locates in this system.
